sections.text: Blog > What Causes PCB Leakage Current and How to Reduce Electrical Leakage in Circuits What Causes PCB Leakage Current and How to Reduce Electrical Leakage in Circuits by: Mila Jul 03,2026 282 Views 0 Comments Posted in PCB Design & Layout leakage current electric current leakage electrical leakage pcb leakage current In high-voltage electronics, medical devices, industrial control systems, and precision measurement circuits, PCB leakage current can significantly affect system stability and measurement accuracy, even at nanoampere levels. Improper layout or insulation design may lead to signal drift, increased power loss, or long-term reliability issues. PCB leakage current is the unintend...

sections.heading: What Is PCB Leakage Current?
sections.text: In high-voltage electronics, medical devices, industrial control systems, and precision measurement circuits, PCB leakage current can significantly affect system stability and measurement accuracy, even at nanoampere levels. Improper layout or insulation design may lead to signal drift, increased power loss, or long-term reliability issues. PCB leakage current is the unintended current flowing between conductors through insulating materials or PCB surface paths. It is mainly influenced by layout design, material properties, contamination, and environmental conditions such as humidity. During the early design stage, PCBWay Design Service provides DFM support and high-voltage PCB layout optim...
